comment: Quality Gates catalog — release dimension. Schema spec: quality/catalogs/README.md. Verifier impl: quality/gates/release/. Reports: quality/reports/verifications/release/.

asserts: GET https://github.com/reubenjohn/reposix/releases/latest/download/reposix-installer.sh returns HTTP 200
the response body is >= 1024 bytes and starts with '#!'

rows.owner_hint: if RED: release.yml did not fire on the last reposix-cli-v* tag (per P56 RELEASE-01 root cause), or release-plz cut a non-cli per-crate release after the cli release moving the latest pointer (P56 SURPRISES.md row 1)

asserts: GET https://github.com/reubenjohn/reposix/releases/latest/download/reposix-installer.ps1 returns HTTP 200
the response body is >= 1024 bytes

rows.owner_hint: if RED: release.yml did not fire on the last reposix-cli-v* tag (per P56 RELEASE-01 root cause), or release-plz cut a non-cli per-crate release after the cli release moving the latest pointer (P56 SURPRISES.md row 1)

asserts: GET https://api.github.com/repos/reubenjohn/homebrew-reposix/contents/Formula/reposix.rb returns HTTP 200
the formula's `version "X.Y.Z"` string equals the latest reposix-cli release tag's version component

rows.owner_hint: if RED: .github/workflows/release.yml upload-homebrew-formula job did not fire (P56 root cause was missing tag glob), or HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN secret expired

rows.command: git clone https://github.com/reubenjohn/reposix && cd reposix && cargo build --release --workspace --bins

asserts: the most recent successful run of ci.yml on main branch's `test` job exited 0 (build-from-source is covered by the workspace cargo test build)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: ci.yml `test` job is failing on main; investigate ci.yml workflow logs

asserts: GET https://crates.io/api/v1/crates/reposix-cli returns HTTP 200
the response's `crate.max_version` field equals the workspace.package.version in Cargo.toml (e.g., '0.11.3')

rows.owner_hint: if RED: release-plz failed to publish reposix-cli at the workspace version; check .github/workflows/release-plz.yml run logs

asserts: GET https://api.github.com/repos/reubenjohn/reposix/releases/latest returns HTTP 200
the response's `assets` array has length >= 7 (5 platform archives + 2 installers; SHA256SUMS is bonus)
every asset's `state` is 'uploaded'

rows.owner_hint: if RED: release.yml did not fire on the last reposix-cli-v* tag (P56 SURPRISES.md row 2: GITHUB_TOKEN-tag-push exemption; recovery via `gh workflow run release.yml --ref reposix-cli-vX.Y.Z`)

asserts: GET https://api.github.com/repos/reubenjohn/homebrew-reposix/contents/Formula/reposix.rb returns HTTP 200
decoding the base64 `content` field and parsing for `version "X.Y.Z"` yields a string equal to the crates.io max_version of reposix-cli

rows.owner_hint: if RED: release.yml upload-homebrew-formula job did not run (HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN missing or expired), or release-plz published a per-crate release between cli releases (P56 SURPRISES.md row 1 latest-pointer drift)

asserts: in a fresh rust:1.82-slim container with cargo-binstall installed, `cargo binstall --no-confirm --dry-run reposix-cli` resolves to a prebuilt GitHub Release binary (greppable URL match against github.com/reubenjohn/reposix/releases/download/...)
PARTIAL acceptable per P56 SURPRISES.md row 3: binstall metadata mismatch tracked under MIGRATE-03 v0.12.1 (~10 LOC fix); PARTIAL is the documented expected state until v0.12.1

rows.owner_hint: if RED (not PARTIAL): the binstall metadata regressed further OR the prebuilt binary is missing — check release.yml asset list AND crates/reposix-cli/Cargo.toml [package.metadata.binstall]
